design_philosophy: Modern minimalist, content-first. Strip away heavy graphics. Focus on bold, legible typography and generous white space. High contrast for readability.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight text-[#111111]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#111111]

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5E5E5]

search_results.item_style: group relative flex flex-col gap-2 p-6 rounded-2xl hover:bg-[#F9F9F9] transition-all duration-300 ease-out border border-transparent hover:border-[#E5E5E5]

search_input.style: w-full bg-white border-2 border-[#E5E5E5] focus-within:border-[#111111] rounded-full px-6 py-4 text-lg shadow-sm transition-all outline-none text-[#111111] placeholder:text-[#8A8A8A]

filter_dropdown.item_style: px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#F9F9F9] text-sm cursor-pointer transition-colors text-[#111111]

badge_yandex.style: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded bg-[#FC3F1D]/10 text-[#FC3F1D]

badge_ddg.style: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded bg-[#DE5833]/10 text-[#DE5833]

bookmark_button.style: absolute right-6 top-6 p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-[#E5E5E5] text-[#8A8A8A] hover:text-[#111111] transition-all opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100

filter_bar.style: flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-[#E5E5E5] mt-4

empty_state_image.description: Minimalist abstract geometric art (black and silver circle). Use this as a subtle, low-opacity background or accent image on the empty home state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a minimalist, highly readable search interface inspired by high-end Swiss design.
Home View: Display a massive, vertically and horizontally centered search input. The UI should be extremely clean, optionally incorporating the empty_state_image faintly in the background.
Results View: Implement a sticky header with glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl) containing the search bar and filter toggles (Date, Region, Safe Search).
Search results MUST be interleaved. Present them as a clean list in a max-w-4xl container.
Each result MUST feature a source badge using the 'badge_yandex' or 'badge_ddg' styles to denote where it was fetched from.
Integrate a 'Bookmark' icon button on the right side of each result. It should appear seamlessly on hover on desktop, but remain permanently visible or easily accessible on mobile touchscreens.
Implement Web Scraping logic on the backend (FastAPI) to fetch from DuckDuckGo and Yandex, interleaving them before sending to frontend.
Data structure should allow saving/bookmarking results to a database or local storage.
Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Enforce tracking-tight on headings.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing (e.g., data-testid='search-input', data-testid='bookmark-button').
The layout must be Chrome webview compatible (responsive, avoiding fixed vh height bugs on mobile, ensuring inputs are easily tappable).
